changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Widen word and translation from VARCHAR(255) to TEXT. Clients store a JSON array of per-meaning surface forms (e.g. ["kaufen","erwerben"]) in these columns; a multi-meaning entry, especially in CJK/Arabic scripts with composed articles, can exceed 255 chars and fail to insert. TEXT keeps storage opaque (no JSON validity enforced) while removing the length limit.

sql.sql: ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN word TYPE TEXT; ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN translation TYPE TEXT;
ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN word TYPE VARCHAR(255); ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN translation TYPE VARCHAR(255);
